description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and figure flattering Fit, you can pair this top with a pair of shorts and flats for a look with the oomph factor soaring. Product Details One shoulder black top with short sleeves, has tiered ruffles around the neckline Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
